hero.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
hero.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

aries.general: Today, you may feel a surge of inspiration. Use it wisely.
aries.love: Romance is in the air, but be sure to communicate your feelings.
aries.career: Collaboration brings great rewards today. Engage with your team.

taurus.general: Stay grounded and focus on your long-term goals today.
taurus.love: Tread gently in matters of the heart today; honesty is key.
taurus.career: Hard work will pay off, but don't forget to acknowledge others’ efforts.

gemini.general: It’s a day for introspection; listen closely to what your mind tells you.
gemini.love: Communication is your strongest asset today in love.
gemini.career: Be open to new ideas that challenge your norms; innovation beckons.

cancer.general: Emotional clarity will help you deal with misunderstandings today.
cancer.love: Express your feelings honestly to deepen your connection.
cancer.career: Networking will lead to new opportunities; reach out to old contacts.

leo.general: Your confidence shines bright today; use it to inspire others.
leo.love: A surprise romantic gesture could bring joy and excitement.
leo.career: Step into the spotlight; your leadership skills are needed now.

virgo.general: Today requires careful planning; take time to organize your thoughts.
virgo.love: A shared activity will strengthen your bond with someone special.
virgo.career: Detail-oriented tasks will yield positive outcomes; focus on the small things.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Don’t watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: What we fear doing most is usually what we most need to do.
motivation.author: Tim Ferriss

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
motivation.author: Arthur Ashe

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: Success is walking from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
motivation.author: Winston S. Churchill

captions.text: Chasing dreams one step at a time!
Today is the first day of the rest of your life.
Finding joy in the simple things.

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: It is not about what technology can do, but what it can do for people.
tech.author: Anonymous

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: Your most unhappy customers are your greatest source of learning.
tech.author: Bill Gates

tech.text: The real danger is not that computers will begin to think like men, but that men will begin to think like computers.
tech.author: Sydney J. Harris

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won’t stop sending me beach wallpapers.
A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

fun.text: Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
I’m on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it!
Life is short. Smile while you still have teeth!

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Everything is possible to the one who believes.
faith.author: Mark 9:23

faith.text: Faith does not make things easy, it makes them possible.
faith.author: Luke 1:37

faith.text: To be a Christian means to forgive the inexcusable because God has forgiven the inexcusable in you.
faith.author: C.S. Lewis

faith.text: Start each day with a grateful heart.
Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Wise men speak because they have something to say; fools because they have to say something.
wisdom.author: Plato

wisdom.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: A wise man will make more opportunities than he finds.
wisdom.author: Francis Bacon

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: In the midst of movement and chaos, keep stillness inside of you.
wisdom.author: Deepak Chopra
